name: Mac's Shell Service v. Shell Oil Products Co.
question: Does the PMPA encompass a claim for "constructive nonrenewal" of franchisee's lease when: i) franchisees filed suit prior to receiving new lease agreements that violated the act, ii) lease agreements were presented on a take-it-or-leave-it basis, iii) franchisor stated it would terminate the leases unless franchisees signed the new agreements, and iv) franchisees signed lease agreements under protest and pursued their legal claims against the franchisor?
description: A case in which the Court held that a franchise operator cannot successfully bring a claim of constructive termination of the franchise unless it can be proven that the parent company directly forced the franchise out of business.
